title: spartium junceum f. ochroleucum
intro: Spartium junceum f. ochroleucum, also known as the yellow Spanish broom, is a flowering plant that is a variant of the Spartium junceum, a species of broom native to the Mediterranean region. The yellow Spanish broom has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The yellow Spanish broom can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as creams and ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
